description: Run a spike sorter on a preprocessed recording. Loads PREPROCESSED_DIR/preprocessed, applies sorter-specific defaults, runs the selected SORTER, and saves the sorting under record_store.
rules: SORTER is one of kilosort4 | kilosort3 | spykingcircus2 | mountainsort5
loads the recording from PREPROCESSED_DIR/preprocessed (output of the preprocess perk)
writes the sorting to record_store/sorting/ and the sorter output to record_store/<sorter>_output/
captures the run log to record_store/sort_report.txt
degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface / the sorter is absent
usage: Set PREPROCESSED_DIR (dir containing a 'preprocessed' subfolder); optional SORTER (default kilosort4). Output: sort_report.txt + sorting/.
limitation: Requires spikeinterface and the chosen sorter installed; kilosort4 needs a CUDA GPU. Writes only to record_store.
